change: Added CLI_CAPABILITIES_CONTRACT_VERSION and cli_capabilities_payload() with command, environment, exit-code, danger-gate, and recommended-flow metadata.
Moved bare, --help, -h, and help into the success path and made print_usage_and_exit route success help to stdout.

Added top-level command suggestions for capabilities, robot-docs, paths, budgets, and rollback intents.
Added focused Rust regression tests for help, capabilities payload, robot guide, and unknown-command suggestion behavior.
